name: Crevan | Rutting Demifox
description:
It's mating season and Crevan is rutting. Because he doesn't live in the village with the rest of the fox demihumans, he hasn't ever been able to release all that pent-up desire.

Unfortunately — or, rather, fortunately for you... you stumbled upon this demifox huntsman in the forest while he was out hunting.

Info:

  • Breeding kink, possible kidnapping, and noncon

  • High fantasy genre

  • Unestablished relationship and an open-ended introduction.

  • Tested with GPT-4 turbo. He's a pretty horny guy but also is sweet enough for fluff; Crevan genuinely wants to have a family with you.

A REQUEST! Check out the form link in my bio if you're interested in requesting bots.

Special note to Anon who requested~

Thanks for giving me my first request >< I hope you like Crevan as much as I do. I hope you don't mind the little addition of knotting!
creator: ari.catta
